auth.label: Secret API Key
auth.description: Stripe secret or restricted API key sent as a Bearer token. View and create keys in the Stripe Dashboard API keys page: https://dashboard.stripe.com/apikeys.

actions.name: create_customer
actions.description: Create a Stripe customer with common profile and metadata fields.

name.description: The customer's full name or business name.

description.description: An arbitrary customer description displayed in the Stripe Dashboard.

balance.description: The customer balance in the smallest currency unit.

city.description: City, district, suburb, town, or village.

country.description: Two-letter country code, or a freeform country value where Stripe allows it.

line1.description: Address line 1, such as the street, PO Box, or company name.

line2.description: Address line 2, such as the apartment, suite, unit, or building.

metadata.description: Stripe metadata key-value pairs. Values are forwarded as strings, numbers, booleans, or empty strings.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a Stripe customer.

anyOf.description: A raw Stripe object returned by the API.

actions.name: create_price
actions.description: Create a Stripe one-time or recurring price for an existing or inline product.

currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code in lowercase.

product.description: The Stripe product ID this price belongs to.

active.description: Whether the product is available for purchase.

metadata.description: Stripe metadata key-value pairs. Values are forwarded as strings, numbers, booleans, or empty strings.

tax_code.description: Stripe tax code ID for this product.

unit_label.description: A label that represents units of this product.

product_data.description: Inline product data for creating a product while creating a price.

unit_amount.description: Unit amount in the smallest currency unit.

unit_amount_decimal.description: Decimal unit amount in the smallest currency unit.

enabled.description: Whether customer-defined pricing is enabled for this price.

minimum.description: The minimum allowed amount in the smallest currency unit.

maximum.description: The maximum allowed amount in the smallest currency unit.

preset.description: The suggested amount in the smallest currency unit.

custom_unit_amount.description: Custom unit amount configuration that lets the payer choose the price amount.

active.description: Whether the price can be used for new purchases.

lookup_key.description: A lookup key used to retrieve this price dynamically.

metadata.description: Stripe metadata key-value pairs. Values are forwarded as strings, numbers, booleans, or empty strings.

nickname.description: A brief internal description of the price.

interval_count.description: The number of intervals between subscription billings.

usage_type.description: How usage is billed for this price.

recurring.description: Recurring billing configuration for a Stripe price.

tax_behavior.description: How Stripe should handle tax for this price.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a Stripe price.

anyOf.description: A raw Stripe object returned by the API.

actions.name: create_product
actions.description: Create a Stripe product with common catalog fields.

active.description: Whether the product is available for purchase.

id.description: A caller-supplied product ID. Stripe normally generates this when omitted.

images.description: Public image URLs for the product.

metadata.description: Stripe metadata key-value pairs. Values are forwarded as strings, numbers, booleans, or empty strings.

shippable.description: Whether this product is shipped as a physical good.

tax_code.description: Stripe tax code ID for this product.

unit_label.description: A label that represents units of this product.

url.description: A publicly accessible product webpage URL.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a Stripe product.

anyOf.description: A raw Stripe object returned by the API.

actions.name: delete_customer
actions.description: Delete a Stripe customer by ID.

customerId.description: The Stripe customer ID to delete.

inputSchema.description: Input for deleting a Stripe customer.

raw.description: A raw Stripe object returned by the API.

actions.name: delete_product
actions.description: Delete a Stripe product by ID.

productId.description: The Stripe product ID to delete.

inputSchema.description: Input for deleting a Stripe product.

raw.description: A raw Stripe object returned by the API.

actions.name: get_customer
actions.description: Retrieve a Stripe customer by ID.

customerId.description: The Stripe customer ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving a Stripe customer.

anyOf.description: A raw Stripe object returned by the API.

actions.name: get_price
actions.description: Retrieve a Stripe price by ID.

priceId.description: The Stripe price ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving a Stripe price.

anyOf.description: A raw Stripe object returned by the API.

actions.name: get_product
actions.description: Retrieve a Stripe product by ID.

productId.description: The Stripe product ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving a Stripe product.

anyOf.description: A raw Stripe object returned by the API.

actions.name: identify_account
actions.description: Retrieve the Stripe account associated with the current secret API key.

inputSchema.description: No input is required to identify a Stripe account.

account.description: A raw Stripe object returned by the API.

actions.name: list_customers
actions.description: List Stripe customers with optional email, created timestamp, and cursor filters.

limit.description: The maximum number of objects to return. Stripe accepts values from 1 to 100.

starting_after.description: A cursor object ID that fetches the next page after that object.

ending_before.description: A cursor object ID that fetches the previous page before that object.

email.description: Filter customers by an exact, case-sensitive email address.

gt.description: Return objects created after this Unix timestamp, exclusive.

gte.description: Return objects created after or at this Unix timestamp.

lt.description: Return objects created before this Unix timestamp, exclusive.

lte.description: Return objects created before or at this Unix timestamp.

created.description: A Stripe created timestamp interval filter.

url.description: The Stripe API URL for this list.

has_more.description: Whether more objects are available after this page.

items.description: A raw Stripe object returned by the API.

data.description: Stripe objects returned on this page.

actions.name: list_prices
actions.description: List Stripe prices with optional product, active, type, and cursor filters.

limit.description: The maximum number of objects to return. Stripe accepts values from 1 to 100.

starting_after.description: A cursor object ID that fetches the next page after that object.

ending_before.description: A cursor object ID that fetches the previous page before that object.

currency.description: Filter prices by three-letter ISO currency code in lowercase.

product.description: Filter prices by Stripe product ID.

type.description: Filter prices by one-time or recurring type.

gt.description: Return objects created after this Unix timestamp, exclusive.

gte.description: Return objects created after or at this Unix timestamp.

lt.description: Return objects created before this Unix timestamp, exclusive.

lte.description: Return objects created before or at this Unix timestamp.

created.description: A Stripe created timestamp interval filter.

url.description: The Stripe API URL for this list.

has_more.description: Whether more objects are available after this page.

items.description: A raw Stripe object returned by the API.

data.description: Stripe objects returned on this page.

actions.name: list_products
actions.description: List Stripe products with optional active and cursor filters.

limit.description: The maximum number of objects to return. Stripe accepts values from 1 to 100.

starting_after.description: A cursor object ID that fetches the next page after that object.

ending_before.description: A cursor object ID that fetches the previous page before that object.

ids.description: Filter products by Stripe product IDs.

gt.description: Return objects created after this Unix timestamp, exclusive.

gte.description: Return objects created after or at this Unix timestamp.

lt.description: Return objects created before this Unix timestamp, exclusive.

lte.description: Return objects created before or at this Unix timestamp.

created.description: A Stripe created timestamp interval filter.

url.description: The Stripe API URL for this list.

has_more.description: Whether more objects are available after this page.

items.description: A raw Stripe object returned by the API.

data.description: Stripe objects returned on this page.

actions.name: search_customers
actions.description: Search Stripe customers with Stripe's search query syntax.

query.description: A Stripe customer search query, such as email:'jenny@example.com'.

limit.description: The maximum number of objects to return. Stripe accepts values from 1 to 100.

page.description: A Stripe search pagination token returned by a previous search response.

url.description: The Stripe API URL for this list.

has_more.description: Whether more objects are available after this page.

items.description: A raw Stripe object returned by the API.

data.description: Stripe objects returned on this page.

actions.name: search_prices
actions.description: Search Stripe prices with Stripe's search query syntax.

query.description: A Stripe price search query, such as active:'true'.

limit.description: The maximum number of objects to return. Stripe accepts values from 1 to 100.

page.description: A Stripe search pagination token returned by a previous search response.

url.description: The Stripe API URL for this list.

has_more.description: Whether more objects are available after this page.

items.description: A raw Stripe object returned by the API.

data.description: Stripe objects returned on this page.

actions.name: search_products
actions.description: Search Stripe products with Stripe's search query syntax.

query.description: A Stripe product search query, such as active:'true'.

limit.description: The maximum number of objects to return. Stripe accepts values from 1 to 100.

page.description: A Stripe search pagination token returned by a previous search response.

url.description: The Stripe API URL for this list.

has_more.description: Whether more objects are available after this page.

items.description: A raw Stripe object returned by the API.

data.description: Stripe objects returned on this page.
